description: Shuffle question sequence per attempt for every cadet
Shuffle A/B/C/D options per attempt; correct answer tracked by content not position
Draw questions from a pool 3x the test size; no two cadets get identical set
Exam token bound to login session; cannot be resumed on different device
Exam auto-submits when countdown reaches zero; no manual override by cadet
Cadets cannot pause or resume exam; admin can grant time extension only
Correct answers and explanations shown only after submission
Disable copy-paste in exam window to prevent text exfiltration
Warn cadet and log event if browser tab is switched during exam
Flag attempt in admin dashboard after 2 tab switches
Each attempt gets unique UUID for audit trail
Log IP address of each attempt for anomaly detection
Log seconds spent per question for efficiency analytics
Next module only unlocked after cadet passes current module quiz
Practice Tests accessible at any time regardless of module progress
